channel.title: Daily Autodigital Shelf
channel.description: A quiet system that makes a new sellable pack every day.

item.title: Renewal Reminder Sheet
item.description: A small tracker for domain, software, insurance, lease, and service renewal dates.

item.title: Link-in-Bio Audit
item.description: A simple audit sheet for checking whether a public profile points visitors to one useful action.

item.title: Focus Menu Builder
item.description: A menu of low, medium, and high energy task options for days when planning from scratch is too expensive.

item.title: Store Import Prep Sheet
item.description: A worksheet for gathering product title, description, price hint, tags, and delivery files before using a store platform.

item.title: Two-Hour Workblock Planner
item.description: A compact planning sheet for choosing one outcome, one timer, and one shutdown note.

item.title: Simple Order Form Draft
item.description: A draft sheet for designing a small order or request form before building it online.

item.title: Daily Proof Log
item.description: A receipt-style log for recording visible proof of work without overexplaining the whole day.

item.title: Project Rescue Map
item.description: A one-page map for rescuing a messy project by separating assets, blockers, risks, and next moves.

item.title: Email Triage Sprint
item.description: A 15-minute inbox worksheet for finding the few messages that actually need action.

item.title: Decision Parking Lot
item.description: A worksheet for parking unresolved decisions so they stop interrupting the current task.

item.title: Tiny Launch Checklist
item.description: A compact launch checklist for publishing a small page, pack, or offer without waiting for perfect.

item.title: Micro Offer Pricing Sheet
item.description: A simple worksheet for pricing a small digital or service offer without pretending the market is guaranteed.

item.title: Weekly Reset Board
item.description: A printable reset board for tasks, bills, errands, and loose ends that need one weekly review.

item.title: One-Page SOP Builder
item.description: A worksheet for documenting one repeatable task so someone else can follow it.

item.title: Listing Photo Checklist
item.description: A practical shot list for creating clearer marketplace, rental, or product listing photos.

item.title: Client Intake Lite
item.description: A small intake sheet for turning a vague request into scope, timeline, budget, and next action.

item.title: Appointment Prep Card
item.description: A one-page prep card for collecting questions, documents, and follow-up notes before an appointment.

item.title: Downloads Folder Reset
item.description: A 20-minute digital cleanup worksheet for turning a downloads pile into decisions.

item.title: Invoice Follow-Up Mini Kit
item.description: A calm worksheet for tracking unpaid invoices and writing one clear follow-up.

item.title: Simple Content Calendar
item.description: A low-pressure one-week content planner for small brands, creators, and solo operators.

item.title: Subscription Audit Sheet
item.description: A quick worksheet for finding recurring charges, renewal dates, and pause candidates.

item.title: Honest Follow-Up Draft Kit
item.description: A non-spam template sheet for following up with one real person or lead.

item.title: Digital Declutter Sprint
item.description: A focused cleanup sheet for one folder, inbox, download pile, or project archive.

item.title: Micro Budget Reset
item.description: A one-page reset for seeing near-term bills, small leaks, and the next cash decision.

item.title: Tiny Home Inventory Pack
item.description: A room-by-room mini inventory for renters, homeowners, resellers, and insurance prep.

item.title: Low-Energy Week Planner
item.description: A gentle planning sheet for weeks where consistency matters more than intensity.

item.title: Receipt Runner Ledger Pack
item.description: A simple ledger and daily receipt habit for tiny projects that need proof of movement.

item.title: Calm Launch One-Page Kit
item.description: A printable page for turning one messy idea into one offer, one audience, and one next action.

item.title: Landing Page Copy Blocks
item.description: A fill-in worksheet for headline, promise, proof, offer, and next action copy.

item.title: Renewal Reminder Sheet
item.description: A small tracker for domain, software, insurance, lease, and service renewal dates.

item.title: Link-in-Bio Audit
item.description: A simple audit sheet for checking whether a public profile points visitors to one useful action.

item.title: Focus Menu Builder
item.description: A menu of low, medium, and high energy task options for days when planning from scratch is too expensive.

item.title: Store Import Prep Sheet
item.description: A worksheet for gathering product title, description, price hint, tags, and delivery files before using a store platform.

item.title: Two-Hour Workblock Planner
item.description: A compact planning sheet for choosing one outcome, one timer, and one shutdown note.

item.title: Simple Order Form Draft
item.description: A draft sheet for designing a small order or request form before building it online.

item.title: Daily Proof Log
item.description: A receipt-style log for recording visible proof of work without overexplaining the whole day.

item.title: Project Rescue Map
item.description: A one-page map for rescuing a messy project by separating assets, blockers, risks, and next moves.

item.title: Email Triage Sprint
item.description: A 15-minute inbox worksheet for finding the few messages that actually need action.

item.title: Decision Parking Lot
item.description: A worksheet for parking unresolved decisions so they stop interrupting the current task.

item.title: Tiny Launch Checklist
item.description: A compact launch checklist for publishing a small page, pack, or offer without waiting for perfect.

item.title: Micro Offer Pricing Sheet
item.description: A simple worksheet for pricing a small digital or service offer without pretending the market is guaranteed.

item.title: Weekly Reset Board
item.description: A printable reset board for tasks, bills, errands, and loose ends that need one weekly review.
